name: onboarding_ops
brief: We need an AI workflow to help our ops team handle client onboarding emails, summarize requirements, flag missing info, and create a handoff plan.

name: executive_support
brief: We need an AI workflow to turn messy executive notes into a clean briefing with action items, review points, and no autonomous sending.

name: support_handoff
brief: We want an agent workflow that turns inconsistent support tickets into reviewable engineering handoffs and escalates weak evidence instead of guessing.
